title: iberis saxatilis var. vermiculata
intro: Iberis saxatilis var. vermiculata, also known as 'candytuft vermiculata', is a variety of flowering plant in the mustard family, characterized by its compact growth and delicate, pinkish-white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of saponins and alkaloids. The health benefits of Iberis saxatilis var. vermiculata are thought to include relief from coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
